name: Artichoke-Stuffed Chicken Breasts
recipeIngredient: 6 4 oz. skinless boneless chicken breast halves
1 1/2 cups artichoke hearts, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C). Grease a baking dish.
2. Season both sides of the chicken breasts with salt and pepper.
Using a very sharp knife, cut a horizontal pocket into each breast,
being careful not to slice through in half. Keep these aside for stuffing.
3. In a food processor, combine garlic, artichoke hearts, egg yolk,
heavy cream, bread crumbs, nutmeg, about 1/4 cup of parsley, salt,
and pepper. Pulse until just mixed; do not over-process.
4. Stuff each breast pocket with 2 to 3 tablespoons of the mixture.
Do not seal the opening completely; some stuffing will expand outward.
5. Transfer the stuffed breasts into the prepared baking dish.
Pour chicken broth over the top, then sprinkle with paprika.
6. Bake in the preheated oven for 12 to 15 minutes.
7. Remove from the oven and place the breasts on a serving platter.
Spoon some pan juices over the chicken and garnish with remaining parsley.
Note: Ensure all sharp objects are handled safely, and cook thoroughly to prevent any foodborne illness risks.
